visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit warehouse supermarket, which is identified as Costco. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white puffed-sleeve shirt under a black vest, holds a large, vacuum-sealed package of raw beef. She examines it closely, looking down at the labels while talking to the camera. In the blurred background, several shopping carts and other customers can be seen moving through the aisles. (2) A sharp cut leads to a tight close-up of the vacuum-packed meat package held by the woman. The label is visible with Chinese characters and the price "1300元" clearly highlighted with a yellow border. The red meat has visible marbling through the plastic wrap. The woman's fingers are seen gripping the bottom of the package as she presents it for the viewer to see. (3) The shot changes to the refrigerated meat shelves inside the store. The metal wire racks are mostly empty, suggesting high demand or low stock. A white price card displays "$399/KG" for Australian beef. The camera pans slightly to show more empty space in the cooler. The overhead fluorescent lighting creates a sterile and bright environment typical of a large-scale retail warehouse. (4) The video transitions to an indoor kitchen setting with a warm yet bright atmosphere. A person wearing black protective gloves is seen from a top-down perspective, using a sharp silver knife to meticulously trim white connective tissue and excess fat from a large slab of raw red beef. The meat is placed on a thick wooden cutting board, with stainless steel bowls visible in the background. (5) A close-up shot focuses on the person holding a freshly sliced piece of steak. The marbling and texture of the beef are displayed in detail. The silver blade of a knife with the engraved brand logo "旬" is shown resting on the cutting board. The background shows a modern kitchen counter with an induction cooktop, emphasizing a clean and functional cooking environment for food preparation.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 這個一大部分. (2) [Subtitle]: 多少錢?. [Variety]: 超值得. [Variety]: 1300元. (3) [Subtitle]: 又要開盲包了. (4) [Subtitle]: 回去開開看這一批的澳洲好不好吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 你目前澳洲看下來都蠻不錯對不對. (6) [Subtitle]: 那還不錯. [Variety]: 最後兩包. (7) [Subtitle]: 大家趕快來買. [Variety]: 澳洲嫩煎里肌 399元. (8) [Subtitle]: 不用特價就很便宜喔. (9) [Subtitle]: 但他這個牛梅花就很大. (10) [Subtitle]: 就一次要3,600多喔. [Variety]: 吼吼吼哦呦. (11) [Subtitle]: 跟大家說個笑話. [Variety]: 這一包是美國牛. (12) [Subtitle]: yes it's America貨. (13) [Subtitle]: 因為我們不小心它放在澳洲區但是它是美國貨. (14) [Subtitle]: 可是妹妹說這一批肉如何. (15) [Subtitle]: 還蠻不錯很漂亮因為我剛剛切的時候. (16) [Subtitle]: 我覺得筋跟我上一批比算蠻少的. (17) [Subtitle]: 所以最近的美國貨是可以拿的哦. (18) [Subtitle]: 還蠻不錯的哦. [Variety]: 剃乾淨就會非常的漂亮. (19) [Logo]: 旬. [Variety]: 新刀刀. [Subtitle]: 小旬切牛刀. (20) [Subtitle]: 對很好用它基本上是牛肉雕塑刀. (21) [Subtitle]: 但是要小心因為我沒有頭那麼尖的刀剛剛直接被凸一個洞哦. [Variety]: 哦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, approximately 4 shoppers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long black hair, wearing a white puffed-sleeve blouse and a black vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half takes place in a Costco warehouse featuring metal shelving and refrigerated units. The second half is a modern kitchen with wooden cutting boards and stainless steel kitchenware.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: Phase 1: High-energy, upbeat electronic pop background music starts immediately with a driving synthesized bass line and a steady 4/4 drum beat. A female voice begins narrating with high pitch variability and an animated, friendly tone. She speaks about the large size of the meat package she has found. Faint, low-frequency ambient murmurs from the supermarket's public environment provide a subtle background layer. (69 words) Phase 2: A sharp 'ding' sound effect, used as a post-production sound effect for emphasis, triggers as the price is shown on screen. The music tempo remains constant at approximately 120 BPM. The female narrator continues speaking at a fast pace, her voice exhibiting clear articulation and a positive emotional valence. The music-to-speech ratio is balanced, with the vocals remaining clearly audible above the rhythmic BGM. (71 words) Phase 3: The acoustic environment transitions to a kitchen setting. The sharp, rhythmic sounds of a knife slicing through meat and the occasional scrape of the blade against a wooden cutting board become the primary incidental noises. The female narrator's voice remains energetic as she reveals a humorous story about the meat's origin. The background music continues to provide a consistent rhythmic foundation with electronic synth textures. (72 words) Phase 4: A brief 'pop' sound effect occurs, marking the appearance of a text overlay on the screen. The female voice maintains a high level of arousal and a confident delivery style. The incidental sounds of meat preparation, including the rustling of plastic and the dull thud of meat being moved, are audible beneath the narration and music. The overall mix is clean, with a high signal-to-noise ratio. (73 words)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a shopping haul from Costco, specifically highlighting the discovery of a mislabeled but high-quality piece of American beef, and demonstrating its preparation to show the marbling and quality to viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Personal shopping haul and vlog format.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and variety-show style text effects to maintain high viewer engagement. The combination of shopping and cooking appeals to lifestyle and food-focused audiences.
